prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A family tree diagram with "Error" as the patriarch at the top in a gray box. One level down, "AppError" branches off in a blue box, adding "code" and "context" properties. From AppError, three branches extend to grandchildren: "ValidationError" (orange box, adds "field" property), "NotFoundError" (purple box, adds "resource" property), and "NetworkError" (red box, adds "statusCode" property). Each box shows its unique properties plus inherited ones in a lighter shade. Connecting lines are labeled "extends". The hierarchy flows top to bottom like a corporate org chart.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
